notes: Clean V3 menu remains DB-driven and active.
Single active menu remains enabled and activeMenu message_id is tracked.
New fix: services/postPatcher.js now syncs every post patched with the Comments/OpenApp button into PostgreSQL ak_posts.
This fixes the case where posts 6576/6577 have Comments buttons in the channel but do not appear in Clean V3 menu memory.
Webhook-based post registry from CC6.5.7.7 remains, but the reliable source is now the post patcher itself.
OpenApp comments launch remains unchanged and is kept as the correct baseline.
Comments module itself is not rewritten in this build.
